title: Sales Manager Vacancy at NoBroker - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at NoBroker - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Sales Manager looking for your next big career move? NoBroker in Raipur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About NoBroker:
NoBroker is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NoBroker!
